data.title: Broker: optional output redaction before returning tool results to the model

data.body: Deferred TODO at src/navi/broker.py:177 ('optional output redaction before returning to the model', spec 6.2). Today the broker returns tool results to the model verbatim. Redaction would scrub sensitive content (credential/PII-shaped tokens -- can reuse the _egress_check pattern lists) from tool OUTPUT before it re-enters the model context, reducing the chance the model then echoes it outbound. Decide: redact-in-place vs deny, and whether redaction events get traced. Lower priority than inbound egress (NAVI-6 already guards the outbound channel). backlog.

REVIEW (cold, agent:claude-opus-4-reviewer) of commit bec79f0. Reviewed: plan, full diff, broker.py (_redact/_redact_result/ToolSpec.redact_output/broker success path/_REGISTRY), trace.py (broker_decision), tools.py output shapes, new tests. Commands: ruff 'All checks passed!'; mypy 'Success: no issues found in 34 source files'; pytest 120 passed, 1 skipped, 0 failures.

Per-criterion: (1) PASS web_search cred/PII spans -> [REDACTED:<label>], raw absent (tests assert raw gone). (2) PASS kb redact_output=False, verbatim (test_kb_output_not_redacted). (3) PASS clean output byte-identical (verdict.result==clean), redacted==[]. (4) PASS tracer record carries labels only; payload_hash folds {redacted:labels}, never raw; additive+guarded (record.get). (5) PASS broker() sig/Allowed/loop.py unchanged; only additive ToolSpec field + private helpers + small trace adapter. (6) PASS _redact/_redact_result pure/deterministic/I-O-free; reuse _CRED_PATTERNS+_PII_PATTERNS, no regex dup. (7) PASS existing broker/trace tests green; new tests cover positive/negative/purity. (8) PASS ruff+mypy clean.

Adversarial findings: NO leak-through found. (a) _redact_result recursively walks ALL strings incl nested results[].title/url/snippet AND top-level status/note -> every field web_search can emit is covered. (b) Redaction runs unconditionally on the success path between result=spec.fn() and return Allowed(result); no early-return/error path returns un-redacted web output (the only web output channel is broker success). (c) degraded/error paths (status unavailable/error, note strings) are themselves walked and redacted. Order: redaction runs only AFTER all deny checks (scope/egress/budget); test_input_egress_unaffected confirms egress-denied call never invokes fn or redaction. Deny-path emit has no 'redacted' key; record.get('redacted') -> None -> safe. Mutation: _redact_result builds NEW dict via walk(); purity test asserts out is not src and src unchanged. Trace leakage: hash is over {redacted:labels} (category names like 'openai-style key'), raw secret/SSN never in reason/hash/record (tests assert secret not in repr(record)). No over-claim: docstrings scope this as a backstop over the NAVI-6 regex set only; novel-format secrets still pass (acceptable, documented honestly). Regression: existing test_allow_*/test_deny_egress_* untouched and green.

VERDICT: PASS
